subject_tmpl: Speeding cars on {STREET} — please help
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I live on {STREET} near {CROSS} and the speeding has become unbearable. Cars fly through here every morning between {TIME} and {TIME}, easily doing 45 in a 25 zone. I have two kids, ages {AGE} and {AGE}, who wait for the school bus right out front. I've lived here {DAYS} years and it keeps getting worse. Can the Village please add a speed bump or at minimum step up enforcement? We need something done before someone gets hurt. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reaching out, {FIRST}. I've forwarded your concern to our Public Works Director and the police liaison for review. We take pedestrian safety very seriously, especially near bus stops. You can expect a follow-up within {DAYS} business days. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Request for stop sign at {STREET} & {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Hi, I'm writing to ask about adding a stop sign at the corner of {STREET} and {CROSS}. That intersection has no signage at all and drivers treat it like an open highway. Just last week there was a near-miss involving a cyclist. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I live at {ADDRESS}. Is there a formal petition process or can Public Works evaluate this on its own? Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Dangerous school zone — {STREET} near Bellwood Ave
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, resident at {ADDRESS}. The school zone on {STREET} near Bellwood Ave is a disaster every morning. No crossing guard, signs are faded, and I watched {NUM} cars run the yellow in five minutes this morning. With kids crossing, it's only a matter of time. Who do I contact to get a crossing guard assigned and the signs repainted? This is urgent.
reply_tmpl: Thank you {FIRST}. I'm looping in Officer Banks and our engineer to assess the {STREET}/Bellwood Ave school zone. We'll have eyes on it by {DATE}. Appreciate you looking out for our kids.

subject_tmpl: Speed bump request — {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. I'm reaching out on behalf of several neighbors on {STREET} to request speed bumps between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. We've informally counted and {NUM} cars per hour pass through over 35 mph. A petition signed by {NUM} households is attached. We understand there's a cost-sharing program — could you let us know if our block qualifies? Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Near-miss at {STREET} and {CROSS} on {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor, I almost got T-boned this morning at {STREET} and {CROSS} around {TIME}. The driver ran the stop sign completely — didn't even tap the brakes. I'm shaking writing this. That corner has had {NUM} incidents that I know of in the past year. Can we please get a traffic study done or at least have a squad car posted there during rush hour? My contact is {PHONE}. {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: I'm glad you're safe, {FIRST}. I've personally asked Officer Banks to arrange patrol coverage at {STREET} and {CROSS} starting {DATE}. A traffic-study request will go to our engineer this week. Thank you for reporting this.

subject_tmpl: Racing on {STREET} late at night
body_tmpl: Officer Banks, I need to report what appears to be organized street racing on {STREET} near {CROSS}. It started around {TIME} last {DATE} and went on for over an hour. I recorded video on my phone — I can share it if helpful. This is the {NUM}th time in {DAYS} weeks. My family can't sleep and I'm genuinely scared someone's going to die out there. Can BPD increase patrols? — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Faded crosswalk markings on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello Mayor Okonkwo. The crosswalk striping on {STREET} at {CROSS} has almost completely worn away. Drivers don't yield because they literally can't see the lines. I've seen elderly neighbors step out and cars don't slow down at all. With winter coming the visibility will only get worse. Can we get these repainted before someone is struck? Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Broken traffic light at {STREET} & {CROSS}
body_tmpl: The traffic signal at {STREET} and {CROSS} has been flashing red in all directions since at least {DATE}. During morning rush it's a free-for-all — {NUM} cars backed up and people honking. I almost got rear-ended. Please dispatch someone to fix it or at least post a temporary stop sign. This is {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the heads-up, {FIRST}. A crew will be on site by {TIME} today. If the controller needs parts it'll go to flashing red with signage as an interim measure. We'll have it sorted by {DATE}. — Frank DiMeo, Public Works

subject_tmpl: Trucks speeding on {STREET} — shaking our homes
body_tmpl: Mayor, heavy trucks have been speeding down {STREET} since the Mannheim road project started. The vibration is cracking my drywall and my kids can't sleep. The posted weight limit seems to be ignored entirely. I called the non-emergency line twice and nothing changed. Is there any enforcement mechanism for overweight vehicles? I'm at {ADDRESS} and happy to talk at {PHONE}. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Missing street sign — {STREET} at {CROSS}
body_tmpl: The street sign for {CROSS} at the corner of {STREET} is completely missing — pole is there but the blade is gone. This makes navigation confusing and may slow emergency response. I noticed it on {DATE}. Can Public Works replace it? I'm {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}. Happy to send a photo if you have a way to receive it.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, we have a record of that sign. Replacement is scheduled for the week of {DATE}. Thanks for the report! — Frank DiMeo

subject_tmpl: Speeding concerns near Metra station — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi Mayor Okonkwo. Every evening when the 5:47 train comes in, commuters race out of the Metra lot onto {STREET} and blow right through the crosswalk at {CROSS}. Pedestrians are crossing there and it's only luck that nobody's been hit. Could we look at a pedestrian beacon or at least a yield sign? This area deserves the same attention as the school zones. Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Cars running red light at {STREET} & {CROSS} repeatedly
body_tmpl: Officer Banks — I work from home and my desk faces {STREET} and {CROSS}. I've started keeping a log. In the past {DAYS} days I've observed {NUM} red-light violations, mostly between {TIME} and {TIME}. I can share my log or video clips. Would increased enforcement or a red-light camera be possible at this location? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for that documentation, {FIRST}. That's exactly the kind of evidence we need. I'll assign a marked unit during the windows you identified. I'll also pass your camera inquiry to the Village Manager. — Ofc. Banks

subject_tmpl: Sight-line issue at {STREET} & {CROSS} — overgrown shrubs
body_tmpl: Good morning. The corner lot at {STREET} and {CROSS} has shrubs that have grown so tall you can't see oncoming traffic until you're already in the intersection. A couple months ago two cars nearly collided in front of me. Is there a Village ordinance that addresses corner clearance? And who enforces it — Public Works or Code? Appreciate any guidance. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Speed limit signs needed on {STREET} — no signage visible
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I recently moved to {ADDRESS} and I've been surprised to find no speed-limit signs on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. Drivers have no posted guidance and seem to set their own speed. Can the Village add signage on this stretch? I'd also welcome a speed feedback sign if the budget allows. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Near-miss involving school children — {STREET} at {CROSS}
body_tmpl: I am writing this with my heart still pounding. This morning at approximately {TIME} on {DATE}, a car accelerated through the crosswalk at {STREET} and {CROSS} while {NUM} children were still in the street. The car did not stop. I did not get the plate. This location needs a crossing guard, a stop sign, and flashing warning lights immediately. Please treat this as an emergency. My number is {PHONE}. {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: We take this extremely seriously, {FIRST}. I'm sending a crew to assess {STREET} and {CROSS} this afternoon and have asked the police liaison to prioritize enforcement there during school hours starting {DATE}. Thank you for writing. — Frank DiMeo

subject_tmpl: Illegal U-turns on {STREET} causing accidents
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here. Drivers on {STREET} have been making illegal U-turns at the entrance to the strip mall near {CROSS}. Last {DATE} it caused a side-swipe accident. There's no no-U-turn sign there. Could the Village install one? The Cook County Sheriff's lot on the other side doesn't have anyone watching this stretch. I think a simple sign would fix it. — {FIRST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Pothole + speeding combination hazard on {STREET}
body_tmpl: There's a bad pothole on {STREET} just south of {CROSS} that's causing drivers to swerve suddenly into oncoming lanes. Two near-misses this week alone. The pothole needs filling, but honestly the speeding is what turns it dangerous. Can both issues be flagged for the same crew visit? I pass there daily and the combo is terrifying. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Dangerous intersection — {STREET} & {CROSS}, no visibility at night
body_tmpl: Mayor, the streetlight at {STREET} and {CROSS} burned out {DAYS} days ago and it still hasn't been replaced. That intersection is pitch black after 8 PM and pedestrians are invisible to drivers. I had a close call walking home from the train on {DATE}. Who do I call to get the light fixed? Is it ComEd or the Village? Please advise. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, streetlights on that corridor are Village-owned. I'm reporting the outage to Public Works right now with your address as the reference point. Typical repair time is {DAYS} business days. Thank you for letting us know. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Delivery trucks blocking {STREET} sightlines during peak hours
body_tmpl: Hi Officer Banks. UPS and FedEx trucks park in the no-parking zone on {STREET} at {CROSS} every morning between {TIME} and {TIME}, completely blocking the sight line for drivers turning onto {CROSS}. Several close calls. Can officers ticket them or is this a federal issue? I realize you may have limited authority over federal contractors but I wanted to ask. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Request for traffic calming study — {STREET} corridor
body_tmpl: To the Village Engineer: A group of {NUM} residents on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} would like to formally request a traffic-calming study. We're specifically interested in whether chicanes, raised crosswalks, or lane narrowing would be feasible given the block dimensions. We have funding support letters from {NUM} block clubs. Can we schedule a walkthrough with your office? Contact: {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Good morning {FIRST}. I'd be glad to arrange a site visit. My availability opens up after {DATE}. Please email me two or three preferred mornings and I'll confirm. Bring whatever block-club letters you have — they strengthen a grant application if we go that route. — Tom Reyes, P.E.

subject_tmpl: Kids on bikes nearly hit by car on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — my {AGE}-year-old was riding his bike on {STREET} near {CROSS} on {DATE} when a car doing maybe 50 mph nearly clipped him. I'm still sick about it. There are no bike lane markings on that block at all. I know paint alone won't fix everything, but it sends a message. Is the Village considering any protected bike infrastructure on {STREET}? Please let me know what you can do. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Speed limit reduced? Residents confused on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi. I heard from a neighbor that the speed limit on {STREET} was recently changed but the new signs don't match the old ones — some say {NUM} mph and one still says {NUM} mph. Drivers don't know what to do. Can someone check which is correct and replace the inconsistent sign? We're at {CROSS} and it's the sign on the north side of the street. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thanks {FIRST}. The limit on {STREET} is {NUM} mph per the most recent ordinance. We'll swap the incorrect sign this week. — Frank DiMeo

subject_tmpl: Drag racing on Washington Blvd late at night — urgent
body_tmpl: Mayor, I live near Washington Blvd and {CROSS} and for the past {DAYS} weekends drag racers have been using that stretch as a track after midnight. Tires squealing, engines revving, and I'm watching from my window afraid to call 911 because I don't want to be identified. Can BPD do plainclothes or camera surveillance? This is a safety emergency. — {FIRST} {LAST} (please keep my name confidential)

subject_tmpl: Crosswalk needed at {STREET} & {CROSS} near park entrance
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm a regular at the Bellwood park on {STREET} and the lack of a crosswalk at {CROSS} is a real hazard. Families with strollers are jaywalking because there's nowhere safe to cross. A painted crosswalk with warning signs would go a long way. This spot is also popular for school groups. Can Public Works evaluate it? {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}. Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Construction traffic destroying {STREET} and speeding
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor — since Verdi Excavating began work near {CROSS}, their trucks are taking {STREET} as a shortcut and not only is the pavement cracking, but they drive 40 in a posted 25. I've filed two complaints with their dispatch and nothing changed. Can the Village restrict construction vehicle routes or at least require flaggers? My address is {ADDRESS}. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you {FIRST}. I'll have our engineer review the haul-route permit and contact Verdi directly. Construction vehicles must stay on approved corridors. If violations continue, we can suspend their permit. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Driver ran over mailboxes speeding on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Officer Banks — on {DATE} at approximately {TIME}, a speeding car on {STREET} lost control, jumped the curb, and took out {NUM} mailboxes including mine at {ADDRESS}. The driver kept going. I have a partial plate — {NUM} — and the car was a dark-colored SUV. I'd like to file a report and I'd love to know if there's a way to recover damages. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, please call the non-emergency line at your convenience to file the report formally — you'll get a case number needed for insurance. I'll pass the plate fragment to our traffic unit. — Ofc. Banks

subject_tmpl: Speeding on {STREET} — {NUM} incidents documented this month
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'm a retired traffic engineer and I've spent {DAYS} days counting vehicles and speeds on {STREET}. In that period I documented {NUM} vehicles exceeding 40 mph. The 85th-percentile speed is well above the posted limit. I'd be glad to share my data with your engineer. A speed feedback sign could reduce speeds by 10-15% based on national research. Happy to present at a council meeting. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Yield sign knocked over at {STREET} near {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Good morning. I noticed the yield sign on {STREET} approaching {CROSS} was knocked over — it's lying flat on the ground. This happened sometime last night. Drivers are proceeding without yielding because there's no signage visible. Can someone fix this today? It's near {ADDRESS}. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the quick report {FIRST}. I'm dispatching a crew now — sign should be upright before noon. — Frank DiMeo

subject_tmpl: Thank you for new traffic calming on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to write a quick thank-you for the speed humps installed on {STREET} last {DATE}. The difference is night and day — I can actually let my grandchildren play in the front yard again without worrying. I know it took time, and I know some neighbors pushed back, but it was absolutely the right call. Thank you and the whole Public Works crew. Warmly, {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Motorcycle stunts on {STREET} — weekend nights
body_tmpl: Officer Banks — for the past {NUM} weekends, a group of motorcyclists has been doing wheelies and stunts on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} starting around {TIME}. They scatter before police arrive. Is there anything the department can do proactively — decoy vehicles, surveillance? The noise wakes my whole household and it's genuinely dangerous for any pedestrian who happens to be out. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: School zone speed camera — is Bellwood considering one?
body_tmpl: Mayor, I read that several Cook County municipalities have installed automated speed cameras in school zones. Given the ongoing speeding problems near the school on {STREET}, I'd love to know if Bellwood is evaluating this option. I understand there are revenue and equity considerations, but the safety case seems strong. Could this be put on a council agenda? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Thanks {FIRST}. Speed camera legislation for municipalities is something we're actively monitoring at the state level. I've asked staff to prepare an options memo for the next council study session. I'll let you know when it's scheduled. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Guardrail missing on {STREET} near {CROSS} — dangerous drop
body_tmpl: Hi Frank — there's a section of guardrail missing on {STREET} just west of {CROSS} where the road drops off sharply. A car went off there on {DATE} but the driver managed okay. Without that rail, the next person might not be so lucky. Can this be flagged as urgent? I drive that route every day and it makes me nervous. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: All-way stop needed at {STREET} & {CROSS} — please act
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'm writing on behalf of the {STREET} Block Association. We have collected {NUM} signatures requesting an all-way stop at {STREET} and {CROSS}. Currently only one direction stops. Last month alone there were {NUM} collisions or near-misses documented by neighbors. We respectfully ask that the Village engineering staff conduct an intersection control evaluation as soon as possible. Thank you. — {FIRST} {LAST}, Block Association Chair
reply_tmpl: Thank you {FIRST} and the {STREET} Block Association. I'm directing Tom Reyes in engineering to conduct an intersection control evaluation within {DAYS} days. I'll copy you on his findings. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Hit and run on {STREET} — can police review camera footage?
body_tmpl: Officer Banks, my car was struck in a hit-and-run while parked on {STREET} near {CROSS} on {DATE} around {TIME}. The damage is significant — estimated {AMOUNT} to repair. I believe the intersection camera at {CROSS} may have captured it. Is that footage available to me or do I need to go through a formal process? Case number if assigned: {CASE}. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Flooding pushing cars into wrong lane on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi, during heavy rain the low spot on {STREET} near {CROSS} floods to the point that cars have to cross the center line to get around the water. I've seen multiple near head-on situations. I know drainage is separate from traffic, but the standing water creates a traffic hazard. Is there a way to address both together? Resident since {DAYS}, {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Good observation, {FIRST}. I'll schedule a joint site visit with Public Works to evaluate both the drainage inlet and lane geometry. If temporary no-parking is needed during heavy rain events we can post signage. — Tom Reyes, P.E.

subject_tmpl: Speeding concerns persist on {STREET} despite prior complaints
body_tmpl: Mayor, I emailed your office on {DATE} about speeding on {STREET} and received a nice reply but I haven't seen any change. No additional patrols, no signage, nothing. I don't want to be a complainer but someone is going to get seriously hurt. Can I get an update on what, if anything, is being done? I want to believe the Village cares about our block. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: I'm sorry for the gap, {FIRST}. I'll personally follow up with Public Works and the police liaison today to get you a concrete status update. You deserve better communication than you've received. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Pavement marking 'SLOW' on {STREET} — is it still valid?
body_tmpl: Hi — there's a 'SLOW' pavement marking on {STREET} near {CROSS} but it's so faded it's basically invisible. Seems like refreshing it would be low cost and might help. Who approves pavement markings? Is this something Public Works can just add to the summer re-striping list? Thanks for any info. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Children's safety fear — speeding on {STREET} near elementary school
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I am a parent of {NUM} children at the elementary school on {STREET}. Every day I watch parents and children try to cross at {CROSS} while cars race by. There is no crossing guard, no flashing beacon, and drivers seem unaware this is a school zone. I am asking you directly: what will it take to get this corner made safe? Please meet with parents — we are ready to organize. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for speaking up, {FIRST}. I want to meet with you and other parents. I'm asking my assistant to schedule a community meeting at the school within the next {DAYS} days. In the meantime I'm putting a temporary patrol request in for school hours at {CROSS}. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Request: radar speed display sign on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm a member of the {STREET} Neighborhood Watch and we'd like to formally request a portable radar speed-display sign be deployed on our block between {CROSS} and {CROSS} for at least {DAYS} days. We've seen them work wonders in neighboring communities. Does the Village own any, or is this something we'd need to arrange through a grant? Contact: {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: We own {NUM} portable speed displays and have a reservation queue. I'll add {STREET} for the next available rotation. Typical deployment is {DAYS} days. — Frank DiMeo

subject_tmpl: Ice on {STREET} causing skids and near-accidents
body_tmpl: Mayor, {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} has a patch of black ice that's been there since the freeze on {DATE}. I counted {NUM} cars slide through the stop sign this morning. Salt trucks have apparently missed this spot. Can you make sure Public Works hits it before someone loses control? I'm happy to flag down a truck if that helps. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Aggressive driver — recurring road rage on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Officer Banks, I want to report repeated road rage from what I believe is the same driver — a white pickup, plate possibly starting with {NUM} — on {STREET} near {CROSS}. On {DATE} and again today they aggressively tailgated and honked at multiple drivers including me. They appear to be a local commuter. Is there a way to flag this vehicle for follow-up? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Dangerous curve on {STREET} — no warning signage
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. There's a fairly sharp curve on {STREET} just north of {CROSS} that has no advisory speed sign or curve warning. Drivers come off a straight stretch and don't anticipate it. I've seen {NUM} cars cut into the shoulder or opposite lane there. A curve warning with an advisory speed would help a lot. Can your office take a look? {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Thank you — traffic enforcement blitz on {STREET} made a difference
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo — I wanted to write to say thank you. After several of us complained about speeding on {STREET}, the police presence this past {DAYS} days has been noticeable and the speed has actually gone down. I watched from my porch — it made a real difference. I know police resources are stretched. Please pass along our appreciation to Officer Banks and the patrol officers who covered our block. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you {FIRST} — this is exactly the kind of feedback that keeps our teams motivated. I'll pass your thanks to Officer Banks and the patrol crews. Please stay in touch. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: No pedestrian signal at {STREET} & {CROSS} — seniors at risk
body_tmpl: Hello. I accompany elderly residents to a senior program at {ADDRESS} twice a week. Crossing {STREET} at {CROSS} is genuinely terrifying — no pedestrian countdown signal, drivers don't yield, and the crossing time is too short even for an able-bodied person. Can the Village evaluate adding a pedestrian phase or a HAWK signal here? Happy to provide more detail. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Wrong-way driver seen on {STREET} — {NUM}th time this month
body_tmpl: Mayor, I have now seen {NUM} wrong-way drivers on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} this month alone. The one-way signs are small and easy to miss, especially at night or for out-of-town drivers. Could we add larger wrong-way signs at both ends, or red retroreflective lane markers? I'm a traffic engineer by training and happy to help if the Village wants volunteer input. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: That's a serious pattern, {FIRST}. I'm sharing your observations with Tom Reyes and Public Works today. Your engineering background would be welcome — would you be open to an informal call with our team? — Mayor Okonkwo
